title: Premium Brochure System Preview Board AI
sourceTitle: Premium Brochure System Preview Board AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Premium modern brochure system preview board for NOVA Clinic, showing a complete consistent publication system. Subject: NOVA Clinic is presented as a professional brand or institution with a cohesive brochure family and Premium modern commercial brochure design with consistent branding, polished editorial layout, strong hierarchy, realistic printed-page mockups, clean corporate design language, and complete system thinking rather than visual direction. Scene: A clean design-studio presentation surface displaying cover, back cover, introduction, core pages, use-case pages, proof pages, and full system preview as coordinated brochure spreads. Composition: Fixed horizontal or square system-preview board with multiple brochure pages arranged in a structured grid, strong visual hierarchy, cover page as the largest anchor, supporting spreads smaller, and consistent margins, typography, and brand rhythm. Signature Elements: Cover, back cover, introduction, core pages, use case pages, proof pages, full system preview, unified narrative flow, consistent page numbers, clean iconography, realistic page mockups, and proof modules including before-after placeholders, doctor credentials, safety protocol, and pricing comparison. Fixed source details: Tone: quiet medical luxury. Style: Premium modern commercial brochure design with consistent branding, polished editorial layout, strong hierarchy, realistic printed-page mockups, clean corporate design language, and complete system thinking rather than random poster pages. Color Palette: Brand-consistent refined palette matched to Premium modern commercial brochure design with consistent branding, polished editorial layout, strong hierarchy, realistic printed-page mockups, clean corporate design language, and complete system thinking rather than, with restrained neutrals, one strong accent system, clean white page surfaces, readable dark typography, and subtle print shadows. Lighting: Soft studio presentation lighting with gentle paper shadows, crisp page edges, realistic print texture, and clean high-end portfolio-board finish. Typography: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Keep the output as one coherent brochure system, not a single poster;

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
